title: Assemblia
description: Develop, Craft, Automate. Assemblia overhauls biomes and adds structures with the mod create for your optimized tech world!
body:
![Assemblia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ca2a12d17635397b0994f9a0517e72fb0d6072.png)

## Optimized Tech Experience!
- ✅Built in optimization mods
- ✅Quality Of Life mods
- ✅Biome Overhaul mods
- ✅Structure mods
- ✅Technic mod create
- And much more!


## Some Of The Mods!
- [Soulslike Weaponary](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mariums-soulslike-weaponry)
- Tom's Simple Storage Network for your chest room!
- Better Combat for better combat!
- Better End for a better end!
- Dual Riders for ride horses with your friends!
- 1.20 Backport for 1.20 features!
- Minimap for minimap!
- Better Villages for overhauled villages!
- Explorify for new structures!
- And much more for much more!

## Need A Server?

[![Server](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1067121218198716547/1067204390819217509/Everside.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=79)
